title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das argues that most AI agents fail in practice because errors compound across multi-step workflows, and the industry has normalized this unreliability. He contends that achieving reliability through careful design and dogfooding matters more than raw performance, and that taste in the LLM era is more important than code.
